chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ الَّتِي تَحْرُمُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَلَا تَحِلُّ لَهُ أَبَداً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 81 – The woman who is Prohibited unto the man, so she is not Permissible for him, ever

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/188)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/188)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) بَلَغَنَا عَنْ أَبِيكَ أَنَّ الرَّجُلَ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ الْمَرْأَةَ فِي عِدَّتِهَا لَمْ تَحِلَّ لَهُ أَبَداً فَقَالَ هَذَا إِذَا كَانَ عَالِماً فَإِذَا كَانَ جَاهِلًا فَارَقَهَا وَ تَعْتَدُّ ثُمَّ يَتَزَوَّجُهَا نِكَاحاً جَدِيداً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Safwan, from Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,

‘I said to Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>), ‘It has reached us from your<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> that the man, when he marries the woman during her waiting period, she would not be Permissible for him, ever’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is when he has knowing. So if he was ignorant, they would be separated, and she would observe her waiting period, then he would marry her with a new marriage’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Safwan from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once said to abu Ibrahim, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘It is narrated to us from your father that if a man marries a woman during her waiting period she becomes unlawful for him forever.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘That is the case if he knows about it, but if he is ignorant he must separate from her and she must complete the waiting period then he can marry her anew.’”
